mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna_admin (admin_id, user_id, title, content) SELECT ar.user_id AS admin_id, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content} FROM admin_role ar WHERE ar.role_name = 'CS' OR ar.role_name = 'SUPER' ORDER BY ar.user_id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM qna_admin WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE qna_admin SET answer = #{answer}, status = '답변완료', answered_at = NOW() WHERE qna_admin_id = #{qnaAdminId}
UPDATE qna_admin SET answer = null, status = '대기', answered_at = null WHERE qna_admin_id = #{qnaAdminId}
